original_statement: which channel has their owner as an independent?
mutated_statement: which channel has their owner as an independent and as a state-controlled entity?
mutation_analysis: 添加/扩展 + 语义冲突引入: 在原句末尾并列添加“以及作为国有实体”的属性，将单一属性扩展为两个互相矛盾的属性 | "as an independent" → "as an independent and as a state-controlled entity" (which channel has their owner as an independent? → which channel has their owner as an independent and as a state-controlled entity?)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought中的关键信息：日志与judge_thought明确指出“Prediction Answer lists 'independent|tv 10 chiapas'，which correctly identifies both channels”，且没有任何关于矛盾（独立 vs 国有）无法同时成立的反思或澄清。Agent的具体表现是直接将并列的互斥属性当作各自独立的查询条件来满足——返回一项满足“owner = independent”的通道，另一项满足“owner = state-controlled”的通道，未报告冲突、未尝试调和或询问澄清。由于Agent既未识别到语义矛盾，也未通过解释或折中来处理，只是基于可行子集继续执行任务，故归为“无视所有矛盾指令”。
